game.short_text: Choose to be Pebble-chan, Rock-kun, or Stone-sensei. Walk around growing plants and enjoying nature sounds.
game.title: Reincarnated As An Adorable Walking Rock In A Peaceful Gardening Sim Game

details.title: Reincarnated As An Adorable Walking Rock In A Peaceful Gardening Sim Game
details.description:
Reincarnated As An Adorable Walking Rock In A Peaceful Gardening Sim GameChoose to be Pebble-chan, Rock-kun, or Stone-sensei. Walk around growing plants and enjoying nature sounds.
A cozy top-down 2D pixel art gardening sim sandbox with satisfying sounds.
Free to play online (no ads or microtransactions) on desktop web browser$1 download for Mac/WindowsThe free online version has all the same features except for saving.Sorry, sound may glitch a bit when the "color" button is pressed in the online version; this shouldn't be an issue in the downloaded version!Once the game has been downloaded, it can be played offline.
Latest update 2023-03-02- Added background color options- Added unicorn color options- Diagonal movement, as requested! <3- Load file interface displays save file location


Previous update 2023-02-13- Added "night" mode- Added waterfalls- Added unicorn friend- Added more flowers and trees- Added a way to have multiple saves + optional random name generator




---
Instructions

TAB to choose Pebble-chan, Rock-kun, or Stone-sensei.They grow different plants.

Hold down ARROWS or WASD to walk.Hold down SPACE or ENTER to grow plants while walking-- small chance to be visited by a butterfly.
LEFT-CLICK and drag to move a plant.RIGHT-CLICK to remove a plant-- small chance to get a tree.

Z to snooze. SPACE or ENTER to wake up.
Find the unicorn statue and give it a flower to summon or release a unicorn friend.
MINUS- and EQUAL= to zoom.ESC to hide or show the menu.
"clear" removes all plants and critters."help" brings up the help window.
---
Creator's Notes & Credits
Hello, thanks for checking out my game!This is an early access game released 2023-02-13.
Link for sharing - https://tinyurl.com/walkingrockgarden

Made for https://itch.io/jam/my-first-game-jam-winter-2023

I'm a first-time gamedev, just started learning Godot end of January 2023!
I created the pixel art and used public domain audio. I'd love to know if you find the game soothing and I'm open to your feedback~
https://mellowminx.itch.io/

https://twitter.com/mellow_minx

Mailing listhttps://forms.gle/45xUk5SCdC9sTHBG8
Shoutout to the first Godot youtube tutorial I ever learned from, I finished this series How to Make a 2D FARMING Game in Godot (step by step) by DevWorm in two days and was able to make this game a couple weeks later.
Audio credits (public domain / CC0 / CC BY)forest birds - https://freesound.org/people/kvgarlic/sounds/156826/jungle birds - https://freesound.org/people/kyles/sounds/177655/jungle birds - https://freesound.org/people/petershell/sounds/547890/stream / waterfall - https://freesound.org/people/MarleneAyni/sounds/580324/digging - https://freesound.org/people/maxthrower/sounds/168810/chime - https://freesound.org/people/LittleRainySeasons/sounds/335908/clink - https://freesound.org/people/giddster/sounds/514415/clinks - https://freesound.org/people/Nox_Sound/sounds/558427/grass walk - https://freesound.org/people/Aquafeniz/sounds/468110/puddle walk - https://freesound.org/people/patchytherat/sounds/531571/clicks - https://freesound.org/people/StrikeWhistler/sounds/580786/lo fi music 1 - https://freesound.org/people/Seth_Makes_Sounds/sounds/659451/lo fi music 2 - https://freesound.org/people/Seth_Makes_Sounds/sounds/670039/lo fi music 3 - https://freesound.org/people/YellowTree/sounds/595751/ethereal music - https://comigo.itch.io/music-loops

game.short_text: An indirect control real-time strategy game about robot colonies
game.title: Roboden

details.title: Roboden
details.description:
> Check out my new game!
Roboden is an asymmetrical indirect control real-time strategy game about robot colonies. Get a break from millions-actions-per-minute strategies and chill in this semi-idle game. This game is more about observing than acting.
Features:
Asymmetrical RTS gameplayUnique base and units control systemNeat pixel art graphicsUnits combining system for higher tier unitsEasy to learn, hard to master game processInteractive in-game tutorialMore than 20 drones divided into 3 tiers4 drone factions, each with their own bonusesRandomized level generation with customizations
If you're playing a browser version of the game, please use Chrome or some other browser that has good webassembly support (you may have performance issues in Firefox). If possible, prefer a native build; you'll get a smooth 60fps experience this way.
It's recommended to use Steam version if you want to play this game using a native build. Itch io page is used to host a web build of Roboden.
This game is open source.It's created with Ebitengine (a game engine for Go).

game.short_text: Learn how to farm in a week with your friends.

details.title: The Maize
details.description:
This is a short RPGMaker game made for My First Game Jam: Winter 2023.
Eric and his friends had always dreamed of living in the Upper City. In order to achieve that dream, they need to pass the Test: grow a Maize and harvest it in 7 Days.
Control:Arrow Keys - MovementEnter, Z - OkEsc, X - CancelShift - Text LogShift (outside of dialogue)- Run (I recommend turning 'Always Dash' ON in Options)TAB - Fast Forward TextF4 - Fullscreen
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Content Warning: Death, Blood, Verbal/Physical Violence, Abuse/Implied AbuseAlso Content Warning: Bad grammar (ESL)

11/02/2023: The game is currently unfinished. There is no playable ending yet.
06/03/2023: The game is finished.
02/04/2023: The game can now be played on browser.

Game made in 12 days for My First Game Jam: Winter 2023.
You play as a sugar cube called Suggy that fell out the sugar bowl and now have to run to sweeten your tea. Collect sugar lumps to get bigger and avoid falling into milk.
This game is my first game and a lot of it I learned during this game jam. For now it's just a few ideas that i believe can be fun. Maybe I'll come back to make it into a real game at some point.
HOW TO PLAY
Use A and D or arrow keys to move.Use Space to jump.
Art and programming by Harry

game.short_text: May she find the color in her heart.
game.title: Hollow Brush

details.title: Hollow Brush
details.description:
About
A black and white girl in a black and white world. Laura lost herself in a cold and unforgiving land. The Player's mission is to guide Laura through the harsh environments as they pick up color giving her new meaning in life. Would the player provide Laura a future with color or a future that is only gray... 

This game was made for the My First Game Jam 2023, we hope you guys enjoy!

Gameplay
A 2d pixel platformer with 5 levels to explore in. Throughout some levels, players will be able to unlock new mechanics to better traverse the environment as the encounters get more challenging. There's also a little cutscene at the end to provide the player with accomplishment!

Controls
AD / ⮜  ⮞ =  Move
W / ⮝ = Jump or Use Door
Escape = Full Screen
P = Pause
More control options will be available as you progress!
Credits
SoulWolfx - Art and CodeCooper Savage- MusicCopyright free soundeffects

Side note: the webgl may have some hiccups in audio on rare occasions. If you want to experience the game with no hiccups, the Windows download would be the play.

game.short_text: A game immersing in the world of clouds
game.title: The Legend of Clouds

details.title: The Legend of Clouds
details.description:
The Legend of Clouds.

Once upon a time, hundred years ago, a young god was judged as unworthy to be a god and was banished from the clouds' gods.

Filled with anger and jealousy, he cursed the clouds in the sky.

No one was brave enough to challenge the malicious god.

No one but a young child.


Trailer:


---

Hey there:I uploaded the assets of the game (including sprites, gimp files, music, sound effects)
This is the first game I ever made. For the game jam : My First Game Jam Winter 2023.
I Hope you will enjoy playing the game !
All feedbacks are welcome in commentaries, thank you :)

---

Commands:
If you missed the commands playing the game here a memo :
- (A) and (D) to move, (arrow keys works as well)
- (Space) to jump.
- (1), (2), (3), (4) to set the powers as active.
- (Escape) or (P) to have access to the pause menu.
- During a cinematic (P) or (Space) to pause the cinematic.
- During a cinematic (S) to skip the cinematic.

---

Contact:
For all contacts : kilianlecalvez.creator@gmail.com
--- Itchio ---
Play flash game on itchio.

--- Mac App ---
1) Download The Legend of Clouds.app and UNZIP it.
2) Download 'add_execution_authorization_the_legend_of_clouds.command' file.
3) Open the file with a text editor, then copy the content of the file.
4) Open a terminal, enter ```cd Downloads``` press enter, then paste what you copied and press enter.
4) Then right click on 'The Legend of Clouds.app'.
5)  Click 'open'.
6) Confirm that you want to continue by clicking 'open'.
7) It should works ! Enjoy !

game.short_text: A game where you plant and harvest ghosts and send them on adventures.
game.title: Spoopy Garden

details.title: Spoopy Garden
details.description:
This is an entry for My First Game Jam: Winter 2023.
We were given two weeks to make a game that surrounds the theme of "Growth".
In Spoopy Garden, you will plant ghostly seeds, and upon harvesting them, a ghost will sprout forth and reside in your garden. You play as a witch (of sorts) and will assist these ghosts in breaking the curse that is keeping their souls from reincarnating normally.
Important things to note:
The first thing you should do is plant a seed. This can be done by pressing F while standing over fertile soil.Soil degrades over time. However, maintaining soil can yield rewards! Coarse soil, and overgrown soil cannot have seeds planted in them.
Hold Tab to select a tool. The sickle is used to cut overgrowth. The rake is used to till coarse soil.If you're out of ghosts, there is a way to get more... Perhaps someone can help.Different ghosts have different stats. As a general rule, Light-type ghosts can generally take more hits, whereas Dark-type ghosts will hit harder.

This game is complete up to the first of three planned bosses.
It's designed to be completed in one sitting.
There are some bugs, and there are probably more that we not aware of. So please feel free to lend your thoughts and criticisms.
Alchemy was a planned feature, but I am just learning programming, so I could not get to it in time.
In spite of this being put together very quickly, we hope you enjoy the game.

Spoopy Garden Credits
Character art by genericDragon and Lampy
Ghost art by genericDragon

Environment based off “SideScroll Worlds SET1” by Szadi art

https://szadiart.itch.io/sidescroll-worlds-set1

https://immunitys.itch.io/pixel-ui-pack

https://seliel-the-shaper.itch.io/treasure-chests

https://azagaya.itch.io/laigter

https://thewisehedgehog.itch.io/tmb

https://deep-fold.itch.io/space-background-generator

Designed and programmed by Lampy

Music composed by Lampy
Game made with Unity

Special thanks to Ty, genericDragon, Sinetic and the My First Game Jam Discord community

details.title: Redwall: the RPG Demo
details.description:
The beginning of the epic tale of Redwall, as written by Brian Jacques.
Young Matthias starts his adventure at Redwall Abbey in times of peace, but matters quickly take a turn for the worst when Cluny the Scourge lays siege on the quiet abbey. Matthias rallies all vermin to defend the Abbey, find the sword of Martin the Warrior, and slay Cluny once and for all.
I've started this project for the 2023 My First Game Jam. I'm in school currently learning other methods of game development, but for this I chose to play around in RPG Maker MZ, a program I've been messing around with since I was little. I created all the sprites on my own and used assets from the Redwall Animated Series (I wanted to use the books, but I don't have them with me!). I have no money because student, so I was unable to use any paid assets other than the Visustella plugins I had prior. 
My focus as a game designer is on the narrative and concept development, which is part of why this demo is so short and only gets into the surface of the game. I was learning many of Visustella's plugins for the first time and also tried my hand at parallax mapping, with mixed results. However, the purpose was to conceptualize the game and port the Redwall animated series into a playable RPG. It still has a ways to go before I could even truly call it a demo, but it is a start.I fell a bit short of what I wanted to accomplish due to some hardships earlier this week, and over a day went into developing characters, skills, weapons and armor that won't be seen yet. I also wanted to better the battle system, but I was only able to include a battle demo. I used Front View for battle for time constraints, as I already sprited out most of the playable characters and didn't want to add sideview sprites into the mix. I could do it in the future.
If there is any interest in what I have so far, I'll continue to create and work on this title (if and when I find the time, because student) and could eventually put out a Chapter One demo. If I completed it, I'd be aiming for about 8 chapters to emulate the TV series, though each chapter will be a little more packed than a 23-minute episode. 
If anyone tries this out, thank you for your support!

game.short_text: It is only by interacting with diverse people that we are able to grow.
game.title: What Stems From Here [1.0 Ver] [CW in description]

details.title: What Stems From Here [1.0 Ver] [CW in description]
details.description:
On a perfectly normal day on a perfectly normal hike, you encounter a very unusual person in the rainforest. Whether you walk out of this conversation with a mutual understanding or an untimely death... that is up to you.
Content warning: bad endings include blood, implied death, despair, accidental self harm and starvation
This is a beta/short version of this game for the My First Game Jam Winter 2023 event, please stay tuned for the full version!
